name: Eyepatch

desc: Sharp blue style says trouble may arrive, but properly dressed.

name: Ghostly Hat

desc: Polished gold announces the champion's presence before the wearer proves anything.

desc: Thick lenses once favored by librarians of the Grand Archive.

desc: Teal cloth and a golden emblem make apprentices look prepared.

desc: The eye motif promises visions, whether you wanted them or not.

name: Shady Specs

desc: That jagged grin scares enemies and small children.

desc: Starlight gathers through the buckle for magicians who study skyward.

desc: Twin wings and a dawn crest mark those who shield others.

name: Sunset Shutters
desc: Slatted lenses block sun, shame, and a surprising amount of doubt.

name: Swampy Hat
desc: Green feelers twitch softly, making polite company reconsider approaching outside.

name: Thief Mask

desc: Bulky lenses magnify runes, schematics, and every tiny mistake.

name: Tribal Mask
desc: Ancient clan carvings pull instincts closer to the surface.

name: Trickster Horns

name: Valor Helm
desc: Polished curves speak of earned honor, not empty arrogance alone.

name: Verdant Antlers

name: Voidspike Helm

name: Buckler

name: Elixir Gourd

name: Iron Bulwark
desc: Old ship plating that blocks blows and remembers the ocean.

name: Mage Guard

name: Azure Cutlass

name: Blunderbuss
desc: Subtle work has its place. This is not that place. - Suphara

name: Bone Channeler
desc: Sacred bone hums with magic from forgotten rites.

desc: A brittle dagger of deadwood and bone, eager to splinter into spectral spears.

name: Bonefang
desc: Fang and marrow leave wounds that refuse to rest.

name: Bonk Stick
desc: A proper bonk can fix many manners. - Suphara

name: Breakerhead
desc: Industrial weight turns armor and egos into scrap.

name: Brimblade
desc: Charred bindings hold a cleaver made for brutal work.

name: Broad Sword
desc: Royal guard steel, plain and reliable.

name: Cerulean Scepter
desc: Do not just swing for your enemies. Swing to protect the circle of folk standing behind  you. - Suphara

name: Chainfrost Staff

name: Divine Blade

name: Chaos Reaver

desc: Gilded pages glow hot enough to sear shadows and steady faith.

name: Tome of the First Hymn

name: Codex Vitae

name: Codex of Revelation
desc: Write truth in light, and even old darkness has to blink. - Suphara

name: Radiant Scepter
desc: If judgment must fall, make sure it falls with good aim. - Suphara

name: Oathbreaker

name: Crystal Slammer

name: Dawnstar
desc: Morning light is gentle until you forge spikes into it. - Suphara

name: Daybreak

name: Destruction Staff

desc: Blackened steel curves wide, carrying grim weight through every swing.

name: Double Ravenbeak
desc: Two spiked heads mean twice the enthusiasm for breaking hard things.

name: Dragonic Spear
desc: A jagged scale-point channels old draconic fury through each thrust.

name: Duskfang
desc: The dark is not cowardly. It just knows when to bite. - Suphara

name: Earth Shaker
desc: If the ground must complain, make sure it complains under their feet. - Suphara

name: Eclipse Kunai
desc: Throw the shadow before the darkness knows you're gone. - Suphara

name: Edge of Twilight
desc: Light and shadow braid through twin edges, cutting in perfect rhythm.

desc: A burning gem shines at the top, eager for flame.

name: Umbral Blade
desc: Opposing forces meet inside the forbidden edge.

name: Chromatic Blade
desc: Color shifts along the edge, answering each battlefield with a different threat.

name: Everfrost Staff

name: Executioner Axe
desc: Mercy has its place. So does ending a problem cleanly. - Suphara

name: Exorcist Staff
desc: Holy seals coil around the staff, turning patient rites into swift exorcism.

name: Eye of Vigil
desc: The eye watches everything, including choices you hoped it missed.

name: Fang of the Moon
desc: Lunar darkness coats the curve, drinking blood and mana together.

name: Flame Tongue Kunai
desc: Engraved with fiery seals, these blades erupt with bursts of flame, scorching enemies in a splash of fire.

name: Flameburst Kunai
desc: A small blade can still start a wild fire. - Suphara

name: Flintlock Pistol
desc: Old metal, loud opinions, and terrible subtlety share one barrel.

name: Frost Mark
desc: Mark them once with cold, and every step after belongs to you. - Suphara

name: Frostfang
desc: Cold teeth leave deep lessons. - Suphara

name: Frostshard
desc: Pale crystal chills the staff, and probably your fingers too.

name: Frostspire Kunai
desc: Ice is sharper than steel when you teach it discipline. - Suphara

name: Gatling Gun
desc: Rotating barrels explain themselves loudly, repeatedly, and with enthusiasm.

name: Glimmerthorn
desc: Blue shards glow in the gnarled staff whenever danger draws near.

name: Golden Axe
desc: Gold makes for fine jewelry, but it looks better when it cracks armor. - Suphara

name: Golden Hammer
desc: Gold is soft. This hammer is not. - Suphara

name: Gravestone Breaker

name: Life Drinker
desc: A reaper's edge should take only what it can carry. - Suphara

name: Guardblade
desc: Balanced steel keeps city guards brave and paperwork slightly easier.

name: Harvester of Souls
desc: This scythe gathers spirit from wounds, not wheat from fields.

name: Hawkeye Crossbow
desc: Aim like the bolt is already there, then let the crank prove you right. - Suphara

name: Hellfire Staff
desc: Some flames warm the hearth. Some flames pierce the soul. - Suphara

name: Holy Staff
desc: Mercy and judgment share a handle. Choose carefully. - Suphara

name: Hornbrand
desc: Infernal chaos curls through the horn, ignoring every safety lesson.

name: Hunting Knife
desc: Crude steel works quickly when finesse has wandered off somewhere.

name: Hunting Pike
desc: Long reach keeps danger away, which hunters generally appreciate.

name: Iron Morningstar
desc: Simple iron, sharp points, and no room for negotiation. - Suphara

name: Iron Reaver
desc: Scrap-forged blades choose carnage because elegance never returned their letters.

name: Iron Spear
desc: Simple, common, effective. Civilization and war was built upon the point of the spear.

name: Jagtooth
desc: A jagged edge takes more than blood when it bites. - Suphara

name: Jewelcrest Mace
desc: Inset gems turn authority into weight, and weight into judgment.

name: Knife
desc: Small steel solves personal problems before they become public problems.

name: Royal Blade
desc: Heraldic engraving carries pride along a disciplined edge.

name: Kunai
desc: Forged to fly with surgical precision, these kunai find weak points at melee or range.

name: Launcher

name: Life Staff

name: Longbow
desc: Remember your training. Focus, draw, aim, take a deep breath, and loose.

name: Lute
desc: Fine strings inspire allies, unless someone requests the same song again.

name: Luxbane

name: Luxspire
desc: Carry light with purpose as your Judgment takes a breath before it falls. - Suphara

name: Mace

name: Master Axe

name: Master Dagger
desc: Speed matters, aye, but only if the point knows where it is going. - Suphara

name: Master Hammer
desc: Faith and fury both need a steady handle. - Suphara

name: Master Katar

name: Master Pistol

name: Master Scythe

name: Master Bow

name: Master Spear

name: Master Sword
desc: I copied a hero's blade as close as my hammer allowed. May it give you courage when you need it. - Suphara

name: Master Wand
desc: Mastery is power that knows when to be quick and quiet. - Suphara

name: Meteoric Staff
desc: I took a star's anger and gave it a handle. Mind where you point it. - Suphara

name: Moonfrost
desc: Moonlight and frost both look gentle until given an edge. - Suphara

name: Necronomicon
desc: I bound the dead words tight. They still lengthen curses if you read too long. - Suphara

name: Oak Bow

name: Obsidian Edge
desc: Volcanic glass cuts because it remembers being fire. - Suphara

name: Parrying Knife

name: Phantom Kunai

name: Piercer
desc: Straight steel finds gaps quickly, because armor cannot guard everything.

name: Pistol

name: Azure Flow

name: Radiant Dagger

name: Radiant Lyra

name: Radiant Wand
desc: Light can wear any color if a good staff keeps it straight. - Suphara

name: Ragebound Fury

name: Grim Scythe

name: Recurve Bow

name: Red Maw

name: Rifle

name: Riftbreaker
desc: Planar echoes shiver through the greatblade, opening wounds in reality itself.

name: Rod
desc: Simple shape, honest channel, and enough magic to stay interesting.

name: Royal Dagger
desc: Gemmed elegance hides a pointy reminder about courtly arguments.

name: Royal Fang
desc: An elegant spear once used by the royal guards of a lost kingdom. Their monarchy might've fallen but their design remains.

name: Runed Staff
desc: Polished wood and carved runes hum with restrained arcane power.

name: Runesmasher
desc: Runes are faster to break once your hammer learns their grammar. - Suphara

name: Runesteel
desc: Blue runes wake along the blade whenever resistance answers back.

name: Scalpel
desc: A small cut can do long work when the edge knows its medicine. - Suphara

name: Scrapfang
desc: Cobble-built segments bite twice, catching armor off-guard.

name: Scythe
desc: A hooked blade that drinks from each cut and keeps swinging for more.

name: Shotgun
desc: Close-range blasts settle arguments quickly.

name: Fuma Shuriken
desc: Multi-edged steel spins silently, turning precision into sudden battlefield devastation.

name: Silence of Night
desc: Listen close, lad. The night keeps the rhythm, and the shot lands before the echo finishes. - Suphara

name: Skullhacker
desc: The glowing skull hums softly, enjoying its mavolent purpose.

name: Skybreaker Staff
desc: One tap, the sound of thunder. Two taps, the might of the winds. Three taps, a storm. - Suphara

name: Slingshot
desc: Tiny frame, but surprisingly serious pebble-based consequences.

name: Sniper Rifle
desc: I slowed the shot on purpose, lad. One patient round should end what three hurried ones only annoy. - Suphara

name: Solar Spear
desc: Gold-tipped sunlight makes each thrust feel approved by dawn.

name: Solaris Blade
desc: A radiant sword that gleams like fractured glass. It hungers for swift strikes and punishes those who guard against them.

name: Blight Reaver
desc: Fallen bodies are not finished if the blade knows the right curse. - Suphara

name: Spiked Club
desc: Crude work can still be true work, lad. Especially when it has spikes. - Suphara

name: Spineshard
desc: Jagged teeth along the sword promise fear before the first cut.

name: Staff of Eternis
desc: Spectral wings crown the staff, letting elements answer faster than thought.

name: Stiletto
desc: Needle-thin steel slips past defenses and finds painful truths.

name: Stonepoint Spear
desc: Stick and stones may break my bones, but together now we can stab things.

name: Stormburst Crossbow
desc: One bolt is a harsh word. A storm of them is an argument no shield enjoys. - Suphara

name: Stormcall Kunai
desc: Lightning loves a path. These blades give it several. - Suphara

name: Stormfeather Kunai
desc: Feathers fall soft, lad. Storm feathers do not. - Suphara

name: Stormpiercer
desc: Ten Spears go to battle and nine shatter. Did that war forge the one that remained? No, all the war did was identify the spear that would not break.

name: Suncrest Mace
desc: A ceremonial weapon bearing the crest of the sun. It channels divine force through strength, turning every strike into radiant judgment.

name: Sunflare
desc: A small blade can carry a whole sunrise, if you forge it hot enough. - Suphara

name: Serpent Fang
desc: A fang does not need size. It needs timing, venom, and a fool close enough to learn. - Suphara

name: Sword
desc: It is dangerous to go alone, aye. So I made this one simple, sturdy, and ready for your first journey. - Suphara

name: Tempest Staff
desc: Wind and thunder are stubborn guests. Treat them firm, and they will fight for you. - Suphara

name: Thundercoil
desc: Keep pressure on the line, and even brave enemies start counting exits. - Suphara

name: Tomahawk
desc: A light and balanced Axe. Perfect for throwing from a distance. Throw first, axe questions later.

name: Trident of Tides
desc: As ruthless as the seas, its a mercy upon ourselves.

name: Triple Barrel Revolver
desc: One barrel is a question. Three is a demand. - Suphara

name: Twinblade
desc: Twin edges move in one rhythm, dancing along night's edge.

name: Verdant Core
desc: Living roots coil around the crystal, feeding nature into spellwork.

name: War Axe
desc: A sharp axe used to hack away at your target.

name: Wasteland Cleaver
desc: Spin with care. This cleaver pulls trouble close before it cuts it down. - Suphara

name: Whisper of Thorns
desc: A thorn does not slash. It pierces, and then lets the venom speak. - Suphara

name: Willow Staff
desc: Flexible willow channels steady spells without losing its gentle swing.

name: Windcarver
desc: Curved tribal metal returns faithfully after cutting through the air.

name: Windroot
desc: Crystal-grown branches stir currents that eyes cannot follow around the hand.

name: Witch's Whisk
desc: Old straw channels magic, proving even cleaning tools can choose chaos.

name: Wraith of Dawn
desc: First light should be swift enough that no one sees it coming. - Suphara

name: Wraithlight
desc: Spectral fire burns in the skull's eyes, whispering forgotten names.

name: Zephyrlight
desc: Golden crystal glows brightly, probably because subtlety never learned magic.

name: Acorn Rotten
desc: An acorn that has withered away on the forest floor.

name: Acorn
desc: A tiny seed from a mighty oak tree, ready to grow into something massive.

name: Alligator Gaa
desc: A long, heavy fish with a toothy snout and armor-like scales.

name: Amberstone Piece
desc: A broken piece of Amberstone, still glowing faintly with trapped golden light.

name: Amberstone
desc: A warm, honey-colored stone that seems to hold old sunlight beneath its surface.

name: Anchovy
desc: A tiny silver fish with a sharp, salty smell. Better as bait than dinner.

name: Angelfish
desc: A graceful fish with flowing fins and a pattern that almost looks painted on.

name: Angler Fish
desc: A deep-water fish with a dangling lure and a face only the abyss could love.

name: Antique Key
desc: A key that opens secrets from the past. Maybe one day you'll find the keyhole.

name: Antique Teacup
desc: Every chip and ding in this cup has a story. Maybe one day it will tell them to you.

name: Apple
desc: Red delicious? Blegh.

name: Arkose
desc: A coarse stone rich with feldspar, useful when rough mineral grit is needed.

name: Arowana
desc: A long, elegant fish with bright scales that flash like coins in the light.

name: Ash
desc: The remains of all that has burned. And from ashes we return.

name: Azurite Piece
desc: A shard of Azurite that glows a deep and dazzling indigo when held to the light.

name: Azurite
desc: A deep blue copper mineral. Somewhat delicate, keep away from air and moisture.

name: Banana
desc: A soft yellow fruit with a sweet smell and a peel made for slipping in stories.

name: Baobab Piece
desc: A cut piece of baobab wood, thick-grained and surprisingly light for its size.

name: Baobab
desc: Dense wood from a massive baobab tree, sturdy enough to remember centuries of weather.

name: Barley
desc: A hardy grain used in food, drink, and whatever else hungry adventurers invent.

name: Basalt Fine
desc: A refined powder of basalt that can be used for crafting or building.

name: Basalt
desc: A dark volcanic stone, heavy and rough from the fire that formed it.

name: Bauxite
desc: A rough reddish ore often worked down into useful metals and sturdy materials.

name: Beehive
desc: A waxy hive still carrying the faint smell of honey and bad decisions.

name: Betta
desc: A small, colorful fish with flowing fins and the confidence of something much larger.

name: Black Locust
desc: Tough wood from a black locust tree, valued for its strength and resistance to decay.

name: Bladed Penknife
desc: A small folding knife with a worn blade. Handy, if handled carefully.

name: Blowfish
desc: A round fish famous for puffing up when threatened. Somehow, this did not save it.

name: Blue Tang
desc: A bright blue reef fish with a sharp tail and a surprisingly dramatic shape.

name: Bluefin Tuna
desc: A powerful ocean fish with deep blue coloring and plenty of meat on it.

name: Bottle
desc: An empty bottle with a few scratches on the glass. Still useful, technically.

name: Branch Broken
desc: A branch that has been snapped in two, but is still held together by a sliver of bark.

name: Branch Dead
desc: A brittle, decayed branch abandoned on the ground, slowly returning to the earth. Does not summon enemies.

name: Branch
desc: A sturdy branch fallen from a nearby tree. Simple, useful, and mildly suspicious.

name: Breadfruit
desc: A large, starchy fruit with a mild scent and enough weight to count as luggage.

name: Brick Red
desc: A deep-red brick that looks like it can be used for crafting.

name: Broken Navigation
desc: A cracked navigation device whose needle spins like it knows too many directions.

name: Cactus Pulp
desc: The squishy interior of a cactus; full of moisture and still warm to the touch.

name: Camphor
desc: A waxy, fragrant substance with a sharp cooling scent.

name: Can Empty
desc: An empty can that has nothing left in it. Still intact, it can be used to hold things.

name: Candy Cane
desc: A bright red-and-white piece of candy that carries the scent of winter cheer.

name: Canned Bread
desc: Bread sealed inside a can for reasons of survival, travel, or questionable culinary ambition.

name: Canned Crow Bamboo
desc: A preserved bundle of dark bamboo shoots packed tightly into a small can.

name: Carbonate
desc: A pale mineral compound often found in stone, shell, and old seabeds.

name: Caribou Meat
desc: A thick cut of game meat with a rich scent and a cold-weather toughness.

name: Carp
desc: A common freshwater fish with sturdy scales and a stubborn will to survive.

name: Catfish
desc: A whiskered freshwater fish that looks like it knows where the mud is deepest.

name: Cd
desc: A shiny, reflective disc of unknown origin. Something tells you that it requires special care not to scratch it.

name: Chalcopyrite Piece
desc: A broken piece of Chalcopyrite, bright enough to pretend it is worth more than it is.

name: Chalcopyrite
desc: A brassy mineral that catches the light with a golden, metallic shimmer.

name: Charcoal
desc: A black, porous material that is created from burning wood.

name: Cinnamon
desc: A fragrant strip of bark with a warm, sweet spice that lingers in the air.

name: Citrus
desc: A bright, tangy fruit with a sharp scent and a peel full of zest.

name: Clay
desc: A soft and malleable material that can be shaped into many different forms.

name: Clownfish
desc: A small orange reef fish with white bands and a very memorable pattern.

name: Coal Hard
desc: A refined version of coal. Its glossy black surface radiates the light around you.

name: Coal
desc: A black lump of compacted fuel. You feel the heat of ancient fires within.

name: Cocoa
desc: A rich, bitter bean with a deep aroma and excellent dessert potential.

name: Coconut Oil
desc: Good for your skin and in drinks! Do you like pina coladas?

name: Coelacanth
desc: An ancient fish with heavy scales and the quiet confidence of something that outlived history.

name: Coffeebean
desc: A roasted coffee bean with a bold scent and the promise of wakefulness.

name: Copper
desc: A reddish metal that conducts heat, holds a shine, and turns green when neglected.

name: Coral Stone Piece
desc: A broken piece of hard coral, pale and rough from years beneath the waves.

name: Coral Stone
desc: Layers and layers of calcium carbonate build upon each other to form these branch-like coral structures.

name: Corn
desc: A golden ear of corn, simple, sturdy, and ready for roasting.

name: Cornerstone
desc: A heavy stone shaped to anchor something important. It has the look of a beginning.

name: Cotton
desc: A soft white fiber used for cloth, padding, and anything that should feel less like armor.

name: Crucian
desc: A small freshwater fish with bright scales and a calm, pond-dwelling nature.

name: Curry
desc: A fragrant blend of spices with enough warmth to wake up any meal.

name: Daggertooth
desc: A sharp, curved tooth from something that clearly preferred biting over conversation.

name: Dandlelion Baby
desc: A tiny dandelion sprout with soft leaves and a stubborn will to grow anywhere.

name: Dark Bark Piece
desc: A broken piece of Dark Bark, rough, brittle, and faintly stained with shadow.

name: Dark Bark
